output_dir.description: Directory under workspace_root for report files

output_formats.description: Report formats: json, html, pdf (pdf requires install.sh)

scan_images.description: Scan images for CVEs via Trivy (requires trivy in PATH). CLI sends string (e.g. true).

trivy_path.description: Path to trivy binary for image scanning

trivy_timeout_sec.description: Timeout per image for Trivy scan (seconds). Large images may need 2–5 min.

check_healthcheck.description: Emit finding when Dockerfile has no HEALTHCHECK. CLI sends string (e.g. true).
